items.title: WATCH:  Meet Punch the monkey
items.description: "GMA" looks at why the internet is obsessed with Punch, the baby monkey who went viral with his plushie.

items.title: State of the Union: Trump expected to tout achievements ahead of midterms
items.description: The president will make his case to Americans amid growing controversy over his domestic and foreign policies.

items.title: WATCH:  Four years in, Ukrainian soldier reflects on cost of war
items.description: ABC News visits Roman, a firefighter-turned soldier, to see the toll it has taken on him, his family and his country.

items.title: WATCH:  The story behind 'Front Porch Freestyles'
items.description: The YouTube hit transforms front porches into stages for emerging artists and music stars alike.
